ttps.technique: Credentials from Password Stores: Credentials from Web Browsers
ttps.evidence_snippet: In Fog Ransomware intrusions, operators were observed using the legitimate Microsoft utility, Esentutl.exe, to collect and back-up copies of sensitive login data

summary: Bridewell 2025 annual CTI report covering malicious infrastructure tracking (28,000+ servers), information stealer ecosystem analysis (Lumma/Redline/StealC dominance), and emerging threats. Key findings: 40% malicious infrastructure in US/China (down 8% from 2023), notable increase in Sliver/Brute Ratel C2 (decrease in Cobalt Strike), Chinese-nexus tools (ShadowPad/PlugX/Supershell) dominate top 10. Information stealers remain primary initial access for ransomware (Akira/RansomHub/Hellcat). Research highlights: ClickFix phishing technique adoption by nation-state actors (APT28/Lazarus/Kimsuky/MuddyWater), EDRKillers surge (EDRKillShifter/RansomHub), Fog ransomware emergence with Akira TTP overlap. 2025 outlook covers edge device exploitation, ORB networks, RaaS ecosystem evolution, cryptocurrency theft, GenAI threats, geopolitical impacts, cloud-native attacks, RMM tool abuse.
